auditName: Pokémon Champions Regional / Permanent Form Audit
scope: Audit only. No Pokémon database entries were created, deleted, overwritten, or merged.

primarySources.name: Bulbapedia - List of Pokémon in Pokémon Champions
primarySources.notes: States permanent functionally distinct forms are listed alongside base forms; current roster Regular Roster M-A until 2026-06-16.

formsRequiringManualReview.reason: Local Male exists but base_species/form fields encode it as a base entry; audit flags Female missing and recommends normalising Male metadata before adding Female.
Local Male exists as base entry and Mega Male/Female exist; non-Mega Female is missing. Manual review needed to avoid confusing Mega gender forms with base gender forms.
Local Medium exists as base entry; missing size varieties are mechanically distinct by stats/speed and should be separate if supported by UI.
Official roster lists these forms separately; most are already local. Confirm whether app should keep all cosmetic-only forms searchable or collapse visual variants in UI only.

implementationNotes: This pass intentionally does not modify public/data/pokemon.json or public/db.json.
Missing forms should be added as separate database entries in a later data-entry pass using official stat/type/move/ability data.
Do not merge regional, gender-mechanical, breed, or size-mechanical entries into base species.
